title: Earth Science Teacher
status: Part Time, 0.5 FTEMinimum Requirements:An Active Utah Secondary Education Teaching License with Earth Science 1 or Earth Science 2 endorsement.The salary for this position is assigned to the TT Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkTT Salary Schedule.For new hires & rehires, WCSD will recognize no more than thirteen full time, complete years of previous teaching experience when placing on the TT Salary Schedule.
